title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: CHRISTMAS VALLEY ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Adult Outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, and Post-Traumatic Stress Disorder. 87520 Bay Road Christmas Valley, OR 97641 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 947-6021 4 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 947-6021 ext 4 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees also available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lake County Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER AND ADDICTIONS TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. CHRISTMAS VALLEY
